sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter / பெயர்ச்சொல் (அஃறிணை)
1. a fortified place provided with a garrison, a station for a guard or garrison.
2. a preservative or safeguard, an amulet
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Neuter of a derivative of G5442; a guard case, that is, “phylactery” for wearing slips of Scripture texts: - phylactery.
